subject: [SDNC] Use official elasticsearch helm chart
commit_message:
[SDNC] Use official elasticsearch helm chart

- use official elasticsearch helm chart
- this replaces the common/elasticsearch which is a copy
  of the bitnami elasticsearch chart
- bump chart version to 16.0.1

Issue-ID: OOM-3381
Change-Id: If177f33a49696935313edf2ad206b711c5698dd2
Signed-off-by: Fiete Ostkamp <fiete.ostkamp@telekom.de>
